name: kujenga-image-gen
description: LinkedIn post image generator — OGUN shared tool. HTML/CSS templates rendered via system browser → JPG.

scripts.test:kd-landscape: node generate.js --client kujenga-digital --template headline-card --headline "The Referral Trap" --subtext "YOU DON'T NEED MORE REFERRALS. YOU NEED A SYSTEM." --watermark "DEMAND" --size landscape --output output/test-kd-landscape.jpg
scripts.test:kd-portrait: node generate.js --client kujenga-digital --template headline-card --headline "The Referral Trap" --subtext "YOU DON'T NEED MORE REFERRALS. YOU NEED A SYSTEM." --watermark "DEMAND" --size portrait  --output output/test-kd-portrait.jpg
scripts.test:stat: node generate.js --client kujenga-digital --template stat-card    --headline "$497"              --subtext "DEMAND AUDIT · FULL DIAGNOSIS" --watermark "AUDIT" --size landscape --output output/test-stat.jpg
